import axios from'axios';// Base URL for API calls
const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:5000/api';// Create axios instance
const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// API functions for student operations
export const studentAPI={// Get all students
getAllStudents:()=>api.get('/students'),// Get student by ID
getStudentById:id=>api.get(`/students/${id}`),// Create new student
createStudent:studentData=>api.post('/students',studentData),// Update student
updateStudent:(id,studentData)=>api.put(`/students/${id}`,studentData),// Delete student
deleteStudent:id=>api.delete(`/students/${id}`),// Search students
searchStudents:query=>api.get(`/students/search/${query}`)};export default api;
